messages.subject: [R-SIG-Win] Rtools43 update
messages.body_plain:
Dear R Windows developers,

an update of Rtools43, the toolchain for R for Windows used by R-devel 
and R 4.3, is available as revision 5863 from

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools43/rtools.html

R packages able to read files using libwebp should be rebuilt and 
reinstalled due to a security vulnerability (CVE-2023-2863). This may be 
also indirect through other packages or libraries.

No changes in the list of libraries for linking are required.

Pkg-config is now available for querying libraries for linking and 
compilation flags. See 
https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/base/howto-R-devel.html for more 
details (setting this up with github actions requires some tweaks).

The compilers and a number of libraries have been updated.

There is an experimental build for aarch64 based on LLVM.

See https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools43/news.html for 
more details.

Best
Tomas
